{{Infobox character
| name = Stonefang
| aliases = Stonefang Kameira
| species = Kameira
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Security|security]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Rose Tower]]}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A Stonefang, also known as a Stonefang [[Kameira]], is a large, formidable creature categorized as a type of [[Kameira]]. These animals resemble massive dogs with [[ruby]] or scarlet stripes and can grow to the size of a tiger or a lion. They are known for being extremely difficult to kill and possess an intense instinct to protect their nests, making them ideal as relentless security for guarding specific locations or treasures for extended periods without needing rest. While they are dangerous fighters capable of inflicting serious injury, they can be trained to follow commands and may respond to certain individuals with submission or whining.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Stonefangs are [[ruby]]-striped dogs the size of tigers used for security.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Stonefang]] [[Kameira]] is a giant [[ruby]]-striped dog.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Stonefang]] is a tiger-sized dog.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Stonefang]] is a massive, scarlet-striped dog [[Kameira]] the size of a lion.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Stonefang]] was still alive inside the [[Rose Tower]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Stonefang]] is a creature that prowls protectively in front of boxes.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Stonefang]] is a creature that whimpered.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Kameira]]
